## Source: amazon-inspector (2704e731d0b82aa5927cf3713f741111b03fe8efb2d886cb0ef472a24705c5e3)
The package identitysecuretokenserv was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ca5ba4e9963b86a0d413136370fbfc88c805d09d772ea48ca92c05755f0b05dc)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'identitysecuretokenserv' @ 10.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
